query: Palworld 1.0 auto-run functionality fast travel resettable missions new partner skills

mako.raw:
{"query":"Palworld 1.0 auto-run functionality fast travel resettable missions new partner skills","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1084,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.gamespot.com/articles/everything-new-in-palworld-1-0/","title":"Everything New In Palworld 1.0 - New Pals, Mechanics, Tools, And More - GameSpot","content":"4 days ago — An auto-run feature has been added, so you only need to press one button to automatically run. ing, dashing, switching weapons, and charging ...
You can also take on the appearance of various bosses with new headgear.
When within the base range, you can fast travel directly from the map.
No more trekking to the nearest fast-travel point, or having to interact with the Palbox in your base.
The Free Pal Alliance will attack in Crescent Moon Shore, while the Eternal Pyre Faction will raid in Mount Obsidian.
- You can now change a Pal’s Favorite setting directly from the Pal Box UI.
You can read the full patch notes on the Palworld Steam page."},{"url":"https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/07/10/palworld-1-0-launches-with-a-huge-patch/","title":"Palworld 1.0 launches with a huge patch | TheSixthAxis","content":"8 days ago — Implemented an auto-run function. With one press of a button, you can keep running automatically, making long-distance travel more comfortable.Read more
Here are the full patch notes which give Destiny 2 a run for it’s money in size!
Accessing one reveals the surrounding map and lets it serve as a fast travel point, making exploration of uncharted areas easier.
Changed the appearance of wild Red Berry plants to be easier to spot, and placed them additionally at the Sea Breeze Archipelago, Marsh Island, Eastern Wild Island, and Isle of Silence.
New NPCs and Journals have also been added across the world, letting you learn more about the world of Palworld through exploration.
We’ve added a new mechanic, Awakening, that lets you strengthen your Pals even further.
· New: While in party, reduces shield regeneration delay by 30% and reduces damage taken by your shield by 65%.
Powerful passives with entirely new characteristics have been introduced, bringing new possibilities to raising and selective breeding."},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/wikis/palworld/Palworld_1.0_Details_and_Patch_Notes","title":"Palworld 1.0 Details and Patch Notes - Palworld Guide - IGN","content":"Version 1.0 of Palworld has arrived, bringing with it an official full release, tonnes of new content, adjustments and fixes, and much more!
Lamball's Fluffy Shield now has a wider defense range, making it easier to block attacks.
Adjusted the balance of Pal Labor Research Laboratory and added new levels and effects to various research categories.
Speaking of new areas to explore, the new regions introduced in 1.0 have been designed to make Palpagos much larger and more vibrant, while existing zones are receiving a handful of substantive updates and improvements.
Implemented an auto-run function.
Main missions can now be progressed in PvP mode."},{"url":"https://www.g2a.com/news/features/palworld-1-0-patch-notes/","title":"Palworld 1.0 Patch Notes - What's New - G2A News","content":"8 days ago — New systems include Awakening, Mutation, new passives, and reworked Partner Skills. Over 200 Partner Skills have been adjusted or replaced. ...
Here is a clear breakdown of the most important changes in Palworld 1.0.
The combat system, tower bosses, raids, mounts, and active skills received major changes.
New continuous sub-missions, NPCs, journals, and regional storylines have been added."},{"url":"https://logicservers.com/blog/palworld-1-0-is-now-available","title":"Palworld 1.0 is Now Available | LogicServers","content":"The official 1.0 changelog is huge, with new places to explore, a proper story push, 72 new Pals, fresh progression systems, base changes, multiplayer work, combat improvements, and a lot of rebalancing across the whole game.
Either way, they sound much more like actual places now.
1.0 adds 72 new Pals in total, made up of 47 new Pals and 25 variants, bringing the total to 287.","date":"8 days ago"}]}

","score":0.683948,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.gamespot.com/articles/everything-new-in-palworld-1-0","title":"Everything New In Palworld 1.0 - New Pals, Mechanics, Tools, And More - GameSpot","content":"# Everything New In Palworld 1.0 – New Pals, Mechanics, Tools, And More. The list of new additions to Palworld makes for some of the longest patch notes we've ever read. Palworld has left early access with its 1.0 release that adds new areas, new pals, world improvements, new tools, and much more. Here, we detail everything new in the full release of Palworld, so you can see it all at a glance. If you’ve not yet jumped on the hype train, developer Pocketpair announced that there will be no price increase between early access and the full release. Sunreach is a new series of islands. Above Palpagos a new series of islands have appeared that are being held in the sky by Paldium–the game’s element that you might recognize as being used in the crafting of Pal Spheres. Sunreach has new Pals, new tower bosses, and new ores. The World Tree is vital to Palworld’s story, and you can finally visit it and take on the challenges it presents.","score":0.4765072,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/Palworld/comments/1usbv5s/palworld_10_changelog_is_out_now","title":"Palworld 1.0 - Changelog IS OUT NOW","content":"Palworld 1.0 - Changelog IS OUT NOW

Palworld 1.0 patch notes: Sunreach, the World Tree, 72 new Pals, level cap 80, Mutation and Awakening. Full recap and what it means for your dedicated server. The update is free for everyone who already owns the game, and Pocketpair did not use the launch to raise the price, a gesture the studio describes as a thank-you to a community that just passed 40 million total players. Here is what 1.0 really changes, both in-game and on your dedicated server. The Palworld 1.0 patch notes add two major new regions (Sunreach and the World Tree), 72 new Pals, a level cap raised from 65 to 80, two brand-new breeding mechanics (Mutation and Awakening) and 13 new weapons.","score":0.36330852,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.61,"request_id":"fad84fa7-c31e-4056-8dc6-d45d7bbcada5"}
